records.question: Who are the reviewers named Mike Anderson with ratings of at least 3 stars given on or before 2011-01-09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' AND reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND rating.stars >= 3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.rID
FROM Reviewer AS T1
INNER JOIN Rating AS T2
  ON T1.rID = T2.rID
WHERE
  T1.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND T2.ratingDate <= '2011-01-09' AND T2.stars >= 3

records.question: Which reviewers have the name Daniel Lewis and have given ratings?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE reviewer.name = 'Daniel Lewis'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.rID FROM Reviewer AS T1 WHERE T1.name = 'Daniel Lewis' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Rating AS T2 WHERE T2.rID = T1.rID)

records.question: Which reviewers rated Victor Fleming’s movies with at most 2 stars since January 22, 2011?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.ratingdate >= '2011-01-22' AND movie.director = 'Victor Fleming' AND rating.stars <= 2
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.rID FROM Reviewer AS T1 INNER JOIN Rating AS T2 ON T1.rID = T2.rID INNER JOIN Movie AS T3 ON T2.mID = T3.mID WHERE T2.ratingDate >= '2011-01-22' AND T2.stars <= 2 AND T3.director = 'Victor Fleming'

records.question: Which reviewers named Ashley White gave exactly 3 stars on 2011-01-02 to the movie E.T., directed by Steven Spielberg and released in 1982 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.year <= 1982 AND movie.title = 'E.T.' AND reviewer.name = 'Ashley White' AND rating.stars = 3 AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-02' AND movie.director = 'Steven Spielberg'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.rID
FROM Reviewer AS T1
INNER JOIN Rating AS T2
  ON T1.rID = T2.rID
INNER JOIN Movie AS T3
  ON T2.mID = T3.mID
WHERE
  T1.name = 'Ashley White' AND T2.stars = 3 AND T2.ratingDate = '2011-01-02' AND T3.year <= 1982 AND T3.title = 'E.T.' AND T3.director = 'Steven Spielberg'

records.question: Which reviewers named Brittany Harris have given ratings of at least 2 stars on or before 2011-01-20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.stars >= 2 AND rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-20' AND reviewer.name = 'Brittany Harris'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.rID FROM Reviewer AS T1 INNER JOIN Rating AS T2 ON T1.rID = T2.rID WHERE T1.name = 'Brittany Harris' AND T2.stars >= 2 AND T2.ratingDate <= '2011-01-20'

records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of exactly 4 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars = 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.rID
FROM Reviewer AS T1
INNER JOIN Rating AS T2
  ON T1.rID = T2.rID
INNER JOIN Movie AS T3
  ON T2.mID = T3.mID
WHERE
  T2.stars = 4
